name: Snickerdoodles # 2
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Cookies Cookies Cookies Preparation Time: 0:15
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, and vanilla. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, 1 cup sugar, baking soda, and baking powder. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Cover and chill for 1 hour. In a shallow bowl, combine 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Roll balls in the sugar-cinnamon mixture to coat. Place balls 2 inches apart onto unprepared baking sheets. Bake for 10 minutes or till edges are lightly browned.
